products.name: Aurora 2-Person Backpacking Tent
products.description: Lightweight 3-season, 2-person tent with a full-coverage rainfly and two vestibules. Packs to 4 lbs 6 oz.

products.name: Glacier 0°F Down Sleeping Bag
products.description: 650-fill down mummy bag rated to 0°F. Built for cold-weather and winter camping.

products.name: Meadow 30°F Sleeping Bag
products.description: Synthetic 3-season mummy bag rated to 30°F. Great value for spring through fall trips.

products.name: CloudRest Insulated Sleeping Pad
products.description: Insulated inflatable pad with an R-value of 4.2 for warmth on cold ground. Packs to the size of a water bottle.

products.name: Summit Insulated Down Jacket
products.description: 800-fill packable down jacket for cold, dry conditions. Warm, light, and stuffs into its own pocket.

products.name: Storm Hardshell Rain Jacket
products.description: Fully waterproof, seam-sealed hardshell with pit zips. Your rain-and-wind layer for any season.

products.name: Ridge Midweight Fleece
products.description: Breathable midweight fleece that works as a standalone layer or under a shell. A versatile midlayer.

products.name: Trailblazer Waterproof Hiking Boots
products.description: Waterproof leather-and-mesh boots with a grippy outsole and ankle support for rugged trails.

products.name: Voyager 65L Backpack
products.description: 65-liter internal-frame pack for multi-day backpacking trips. Adjustable torso and rain cover included.

products.name: Daytrip 28L Daypack
products.description: Comfortable 28-liter daypack with a hydration sleeve. Ideal for day hikes and travel.

products.name: Ember Compact Camp Stove
products.description: Pocket-sized canister stove that boils a liter of water in about 3.5 minutes. Folds flat.

products.name: ClearFlow Water Filter
products.description: Inline hollow-fiber filter that removes 99.9999% of bacteria and microplastics. Threads onto most bottles.
